summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 9 features: Strategy Simulation in Replay Engine (POST /api/replay/simulate), Backend Modular Router Refactoring (6 routers: auth, bot, options, replay, analytics, system). All 30 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working with Replay tab simulation, all other tabs functional.
passed_tests: Root endpoint: GET /api/ returns version 2.0.0
System status: GET /api/system/status returns running status, current_symbol, available_assets
Auth login: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials works
Auth invalid: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Bot status: GET /api/bot/status returns enabled, min_confidence, scan_interval_sec, max_daily_trades
Bot opportunities: GET /api/bot/opportunities returns pending opportunities list
Bot history: GET /api/bot/history returns opportunity history
Fragility: GET /api/fragility returns score, level, size_multiplier
Signal score: GET /api/signal-score/CL returns bullish_pct, bearish_pct, direction, components
Risk control: GET /api/risk-control/status returns can_trade, equity, consecutive_losses
Execution gate: GET /api/execution-gate/CL returns gate_status, can_enter, checks
Events calendar: GET /api/events/calendar returns events and state
Options chain: GET /api/options/chain/CL returns option chain with greeks
Options payoff: GET /api/options/payoff/straddle returns payoff diagram data
Replay events: GET /api/replay/events returns 8 historical events
Replay single: GET /api/replay/hormuz_2024 returns bars[], analytics{}, event{}
Replay invalid: GET /api/replay/nonexistent returns 404
Simulate basic: POST /api/replay/simulate with event_id returns trades, equity_curve, summary
Simulate custom config: POST /api/replay/simulate with custom SL/TP config works
Simulate COVID crash: POST /api/replay/simulate on covid_crash_2020 works
Simulate invalid event: POST /api/replay/simulate with invalid event returns 404
Simulate missing event_id: POST /api/replay/simulate without event_id returns 400
Simulate trade structure: Trades have id, direction, entry_price, stop_loss, take_profit_1, take_profit_2, exit_reason, total_pnl
Notifications: GET /api/notifications returns notifications list with unread_count
Positions: GET /api/positions returns open positions list
Trades: GET /api/trades returns trade history
Market current: GET /api/market/current returns symbol, price, indicators
Assets: GET /api/assets returns CL, BZ, NG asset info
Regime: GET /api/regime/current returns current_regime, auto_regime
PnL realtime: GET /api/pnl/realtime returns equity, realized_pnl_today, unrealized_pnl
Frontend: Replay tab shows 8 historical event cards
Frontend: Replay event selection shows price chart, fragility chart, analytics cards
Frontend: Run Simulation button triggers simulation and shows results
Frontend: Simulation results show summary cards (Trades, Win Rate, Total PnL, Return, Max DD, Profit Factor)
Frontend: Simulation results show equity curve chart
Frontend: Simulation results show trades table with direction, entry, exit, PnL
Frontend: Simulation config controls (min_confidence, SL, TP1, TP2) are editable
Frontend: Dashboard tab works with real-time data
Frontend: Options tab works with strategy cards and P&L Payoff Diagram
Frontend: Trading Bot panel works (Start/Stop Bot)
Frontend: Backtest tab works with date selection
Frontend: Calendar tab shows Economic Calendar events
Frontend: Portfolio tab shows Asset Correlations and VaR
seed_data_creation: None required - replay events are pre-defined in HISTORICAL_EVENTS dict
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 features fully functional. Backend refactored from monolithic server.py (2155 lines) into 6 modular routers: auth.py, bot.py, options.py, replay.py, analytics.py, system.py + deps.py + smaller server.py (347 lines). New feature: POST /api/replay/simulate endpoint for bot strategy simulation on historical events. Simulation returns trades[], equity_curve[], summary{} with total_trades, win_rate, total_pnl, return_pct, max_drawdown_pct, profit_factor. Frontend ReplayTab component at /app/frontend/src/components/tabs/ReplayTab.jsx. All features from iterations 1-8 continue to work correctly.

mocked_apis.note: All trading is simulated via PaperBroker. Market data is simulated. Replay events use pre-defined trajectories. ML regime detection uses OpenAI GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key.

strategy_simulation.frontend_testid: run-simulation-btn, sim-results, sim-total-trades, sim-win-rate, sim-total-pnl, sim-trades-table

routers: /app/backend/routers/auth.py - Authentication routes (login, register, logout, refresh, password reset)
/app/backend/routers/bot.py - Trading bot routes (status, toggle, config, opportunities, approve, reject)
/app/backend/routers/options.py - Options trading routes (chain, strategies, payoff, backtest, volatility)
/app/backend/routers/analytics.py - Analytics routes (fragility, events, risk-control, execution-gate, signal-score)
/app/backend/routers/system.py - System routes (root, status, positions, trades, market, regime, notifications, pnl)
modular_routers.server_file: /app/backend/server.py - Main app, WebSocket, background tasks (347 lines)
